task_type_description: Small additive fixture/test pack using P242 schema module, under P240D governance simplification rules
source_authorization: Authorize P243A diagnostic report fixture pack (read-only fixtures using P242 schema, no DB write, no production change)

fixtures.evidence_source: CURRENT_STATE.md P231B confirmed line — mean 0.96859 vs baseline 0.94737; p=0.3018; both robustness checks fail; block stability mixed
CURRENT_STATE.md P227C confirmed line — 120 hypotheses; 0 Bonferroni; 1 BH-FDR weak (F7_high_low/w750 p=0.0008, UNDERPOWERED); 3_STAR draws 4,179 (need >=10,000)
CURRENT_STATE.md P230B1/P230C confirmed lines — backward-OOS 4,265 draws; mean 0.6375 < baseline 0.6410; p=0.626; all era/robustness checks fail

omitted_candidates.reason: All 7 signals returned p>0.05 (best p=0.085 for ACB, p=0.14 for Fourier). No specific strategy_id/sample_size for a single fixture representative row found in governance artifacts. Omitted to avoid conflating 7 separate signal tests.

safety_attestation: All 4 fixtures validated through P242 validate_diagnostic_report with zero errors. All safety booleans false. No prediction edge claim. No wagering recommendation. Historical research governance metadata only.
same_pr_closeout_reason: Type C: additive test/artifact files only; no production path modified; tests pass; governance changes <=4 files; git diff --check PASS
